Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class ComparableCheck<T extends Comparable<T>>

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<SELF,T>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.OrderedCheck<ComparableCheck<T>,T>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.ComparableCheck<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the comparable type
All Implemented Interfaces:

public final class ComparableCheck<T extends Comparable<T>> extends OrderedCheck<ComparableCheck<T>,T>
Fluent assertions for Comparable values.
